productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Stripes Navy Blue Sweater
description: Composition Navy blue and black striped V-neck sweater made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbing around the neck and hemline, and branding appliquéd above the hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron Flat dry in shade Welcome the winter in style in this pullover from US Polo. Stylish to the hilt and offering snug warmth, this sweater makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. Complement this stylish winter wear with denims and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
